settings.tooltip_save: Persist all configuration changes to local storage and engine
settings.tooltip_api_url: The base URL where the Tadpole OS Rust engine is running (e.g., http://localhost:8000)
settings.desc_api_url: The accessible URL of your local Tadpole Engine process.
settings.tooltip_api_token: Secure API key for engine authentication (NEURAL_TOKEN)
settings.desc_api_token: Required for remote orchestration and infrastructure sync.
settings.tooltip_theme: Select the foundational color palette and visual style for the Tadpole OS interface
settings.tooltip_density: Adjust the spacing and scale of UI elements to prioritize either readability or information density
settings.tooltip_default_model: Primary AI model used for newly deployed agents and general swarm orchestration
settings.desc_default_model: The baseline model assigned to new agents or unconfigured nodes.
settings.tooltip_temperature: Controls the randomness and creativity of model responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = highly creative)
settings.tooltip_auto_approve: Allows low-risk skills (like reasoning, search, and formatting) to execute without manual confirmation
settings.desc_auto_approve: When enabled, low-risk skills like {{skills}} will execute automatically without manual user approval.
settings.governance_quote: "Autonomous execution of Safe Skills preserves mission momentum while maintaining human governance over high-risk operations."
settings.tooltip_privacy_mode: Privacy Shield: When enabled, all external cloud traffic (Gemini, OpenAI, etc.) is blocked at the engine level. Agents are restricted to local providers only.
settings.desc_privacy_mode_on: AIR-GAP ACTIVE: External cloud calls are blocked. Swarm is operating in high-security, local-only mode.
settings.desc_privacy_mode_off: Hybrid mode active. Cloud providers are available for high-complexity reasoning.
settings.tooltip_max_agents: Hard limit on the number of concurrent neural nodes allowed across all clusters
settings.tooltip_max_clusters: Maximum number of simultaneous mission branches that can be active
settings.tooltip_max_depth: Upper limit on the agent delegation tree depth (recursive recruitment)
settings.tooltip_max_tokens: Maximum character count for individual task instructions and agent responses
settings.tooltip_mission_budget: Default neural credit allocation for newly initialized missions
settings.desc_architecture_alert: Settings here enforce hard constraints on swarm growth. Adjusting depth or agent count directly impacts the engine's recursive capacity.
settings.desc_template_store: Browse, discover, and install pre-configured agent swarms tailored for specific industries (Legal, Healthcare, etc.). Powered natively by GitHub MCP.
settings.tooltip_browser_model: The local model running in your browser via WebGPU for high-speed UI analysis (Gemma-2b).
settings.tooltip_computer_url: The endpoint for your local 4-bit computer model (e.g., Ollama at http://localhost:11434).
settings.tooltip_enable_handoff: Allows the Browser Specialist to escalate complex tasks to the Computer Architect for deep reasoning.
settings.tooltip_sentinel_mode: Enables real-time UI health monitoring and autonomous error detection by the browser specialist.

agent_config.tooltip_theme: Select a custom color profile for this agent node's signature.
agent_config.tooltip_detach: DETACH NEURAL CONFIGURATION TO STANDALONE WINDOW
agent_config.aria_detach: DETACH NEURAL CONFIGURATION TO STANDALONE WINDOW
agent_config.tooltip_cognition: Configure neural providers, model slots, and core behavioral prompts.
agent_config.tooltip_memory: Access institutional knowledge and mission-critical context stored in LanceDB.
agent_config.tooltip_governance: Configure fiscal limits and operational oversight gates.
agent_config.memory_unavailable: Memory is unavailable for nodes pending initialization.
agent_config.personality_derived: Node personality and core skills are derived from the active system role selected in the header.
agent_config.tooltip_pause: Deactivate current agent node. All mission execution and cognitive processing will be halted.
agent_config.tooltip_resume: Re-initialize agent neural state and resume mission participation.
agent_config.tooltip_voice_engine: Configure the local or remote engine used to synthesize the agent's auditory output.
agent_config.tooltip_vocal_identity: The specific Neural Synthesis profile used for the agent's auditory high-fidelity output.
agent_config.tooltip_stt: Configure the engine used to transcribe user vocal input into text.
agent_config.tooltip_provider: The AI service hosting the neural model for this configuration slot.
agent_config.tooltip_model: The specific LLM powering this intelligence sector.
agent_config.tooltip_temperature: Generative coefficient: Lower is deterministic, higher is creative.
agent_config.tooltip_reasoning_depth: Controls the number of internal 'brainstorming' turns the agent performs before taking action.
agent_config.tooltip_act_threshold: Sets the confidence threshold for Adaptive Computation. The agent will halt early if it reaches this confidence level.
agent_config.tooltip_system_prompt: The core instruction set defining the agent's constraints and identity for this slot.
agent_config.tooltip_budget: Set a hard limit on USD expenditure for this agent to prevent mission overrun.
agent_config.no_models_found: No models found for this provider. Sync infrastructure?
agent_config.tooltip_skills: Primary skills and tools available to this neural slot during mission execution.
agent_config.tooltip_workflows: Automated multi-step procedure sets that this agent can initiate or participate in.
agent_config.tooltip_mcp_tools: External tools and capabilities provided via Model Context Protocol.
agent_config.tooltip_oversight_gate: Force manual authorization for high-risk agent actions.
agent_config.desc_oversight_gate: When active, this node is restricted to 'Safe Mode'. All tool executions and recruitment attempts require human-in-the-loop approval.
agent_config.status_nominal_desc: Node operating within allocated fiscal boundaries.
agent_config.status_breached_desc: FISCAL BREACH: Budget exhausted. Autonomous actions throttled.
agent_config.promote_hint: Use "Promote to Role" to save this manual configuration as a reusable system blueprint.
agent_config.tooltip_sync_memory: Re-sync with LanceDB vector store to fetch the latest institutional knowledge.
agent_config.placeholder_memory_injection: Enter institutional knowledge to persist in LanceDB...
agent_config.no_memory_desc: Complete mission sets to allow the agent to synthesize long-term learnings.
agent_config.excise_memory_tooltip: Permanently excise this specific memory fragment from the agent's neural history.
agent_config.tooltip_save: Commit current configuration to the system registry. Changes will be broadcast across the neural network.
agent_config.save_failed: Save Failed: Neural sector timeout or network error.
agent_config.enter_role_name: Please enter a name for the new role.
agent_config.tooltip_primary: Main processing unit for mission commands.
agent_config.tooltip_secondary: Fallback logic and output validation slot.
agent_config.tooltip_tertiary: Deep reasoning and specialized creative processing.
